name: transform-chain-filter-group-stack
description: Edge case: requires filter + groupX sum + stackY together
messages: Show a stacked bar chart of revenue by category, broken down by region, but only for 2024. Filter out 2023 data.
rubric: Must combine filter (to keep only 2024 rows) + groupX with sum + stackY. The filter can use year_month prefix or order_date. Must have x=category, y=revenue, fill=region. FAIL if 2023 data is included (no filter applied). FAIL if bars are not stacked (missing stackY). FAIL if revenue is counted instead of summed.
